emails.subject: RE: VMI Agreements
emails.body: Hi Vince, Mark Holsworth reviewed our contract on such a short notice. I thank Mark for responding to our short-notice request. It turns out that we need to get this database to move forward on a number of things and have legal save some time for us is an excellent help. As mentioned below, It appears that PennWell's folks want to chat some more about this. Mark, can you schedule a conference call with these people to finalise this contract. I will be out of town all week next week on a lock-down deal meeting. Vince may be able to get on the conference call. I would greatly appreciate it if you could help us close this one! Regards, Ravi. Forwarded by Ravi Thuraisingham/Enron Communications on 02/20/00 12:38 AM Russell@pennwell.com 02/18/00 06:16 PM

emails.subject: RE: VMI Agreements
emails.body: Ravi, Maybe Stinson can get on this conference call. I shall be at the office on Thursday only this week. Vince Ravi Thuraisingham@ENRON COMMUNICATIONS on 02/20/2000 01:13:06 AM
